message:
fix(ci): Windows QuickJS module path + macOS/Ubuntu fmt fixes

- Convert backslashes to forward slashes in entry_specifier for QuickJS
  module resolver (fixes 38+ "Unsupported module specifier" on Windows)
- Escape backslashes in JS string interpolation for dispatcher tool tests
  (write, grep, read paths with Windows temp dirs)
- Gate dispatcher_http_post_sends_body with #[cfg(unix)] (std::net +
  asupersync interop)
- Make os.EOL and os.devNull assertions platform-aware in node:os tests
- Gate statm_is_readable with #[cfg(target_os = "linux")] (/proc only)
- Fix cargo fmt in extensions_stress.rs (if-else formatting)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
